# Thirdwatch — web scraping APIs

Thirdwatch publishes 48 production-grade web scrapers as Apify actors. Pay-per-result, no infrastructure to manage.

## Apify Store
- https://apify.com/thirdwatch

## Blog (use-case guides)
- https://thirdwatch.dev/blog

## Use-case guides
- Benchmark India Tech Salaries with AmbitionBox Data (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/benchmark-india-tech-salaries-with-ambitionbox
- Benchmark Startup Tech Salaries in India with CutShort (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/benchmark-startup-tech-salaries-india
- Build a Food Delivery Price Comparison with Talabat (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/build-food-delivery-price-comparison-with-talabat
- Build an India Local Services Directory from JustDial (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/build-india-local-services-directory-from-justdial
- Build an India Tech Talent Pipeline from CutShort (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/build-india-tech-talent-pipeline-from-cutshort
- Build a Jobs Aggregator from Company Career Pages (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/build-jobs-aggregator-from-company-career-pages
- Build a US Jobs Meta-Search from Monster (2026 Guide): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/build-jobs-meta-search-from-monster
- Build a Procurement Shortlist from IndiaMart Suppliers (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/build-procurement-shortlist-from-indiamart
- Build a Remote Jobs Aggregator with Apify and RemoteOK (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/build-remote-jobs-aggregator-with-apify
- Build a Supply Chain Risk Dashboard from Trade Flows (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/build-supply-chain-risk-dashboard-from-trade-flows
- Build Comprehensive US Jobs Coverage with SimplyHired (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/build-us-jobs-coverage-with-simplyhired

- Find Blue-Collar Jobs in the US with SimplyHired (2026): https://thirdwatch.dev/blog/find-blue-collar-jobs-with-simplyhired
